channel.title: govtech_csg тАФ recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by govtech_csg (govtech_csg).

item.title: CVE-2026-4756 ┬╖ 7.8 HIGH тАФ Out-of-bounds Write in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7.This issue affects Android-ImageMagick7: before 7.1.2-11.

item.title: CVE-2026-4755 ┬╖ 9.8 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ CWE-20 in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7
item.description: CWE-20 vulnerability in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7.This issue affects Android-ImageMagick7: before 7.1.2-11.

item.description: CWE-79 vulnerability in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7.This issue affects Android-ImageMagick7: before 7.1.2-11.

item.title: CVE-2026-33852 ┬╖ 7.5 HIGH ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7
item.description: Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime vulnerability in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7.This issue affects Android-ImageMagick7: before 7.1.2-11.

item.description: Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime vulnerability in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7.This issue affects Android-ImageMagick7: before 7.1.2-11.

item.description: Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7.This issue affects Android-ImageMagick7: before 7.1.2-11.

item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7.This issue affects Android-ImageMagick7: before 7.1.2-10.

item.title: CVE-2026-33853 ┬╖ 5.5 MEDIUM тАФ NULL Pointer Dereference in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7
item.description: NULL Pointer Dereference vulnerability in MolotovCherry Android-ImageMagick7.This issue affects Android-ImageMagick7: before 7.1.2-10.

item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in linkingvision rapidvms.This issue affects rapidvms: before PR#96.

item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in linkingvision rapidvms.This issue affects rapidvms: before PR#96.

item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in linkingvision rapidvms.This issue affects rapidvms: before PR#96.

item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in joncampbell123 doslib.This issue affects doslib: before doslib-20250729.

item.title: CVE-2026-33850 ┬╖ 7.8 HIGH тАФ Out-of-bounds Write in WujekFoliarz DualSenseY-v2
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WujekFoliarz DualSenseY-v2.This issue affects DualSenseY-v2: before 54.

item.title: CVE-2026-4753 ┬╖ 9.1 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Out-of-bounds Read in slajerek RetroDebugger
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in slajerek RetroDebugger.This issue affects RetroDebugger: before v0.64.72.

item.title: CVE-2026-4752 ┬╖ 6.4 MEDIUM тАФ Use After Free in No-Chicken Echo-Mate
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in No-Chicken Echo-Mate.This issue affects Echo-Mate: before V250329.

item.title: CVE-2026-4751 ┬╖ 5.3 MEDIUM ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ NULL Pointer Dereference in tmate-io tmate
item.description: NULL Pointer Dereference vulnerability in tmate-io tmate.This issue affects tmate: before 2.4.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-4750 ┬╖ 9.1 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Out-of-bounds Read in fabiangreffrath woof
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in fabiangreffrath woof.This issue affects woof: before woof_15.3.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-4749 ┬╖ 6.5 MEDIUM тАФ NVD-CWE-noinfo in albfan miraclecast
item.description: NVD-CWE-noinfo vulnerability in albfan miraclecast.This issue affects miraclecast: before v1.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-4746 ┬╖ 10 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Heap Buffer Over-Write Vulenrabilty in timeplus-io/proton
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in timeplus-io proton (base/poco/Foundation/srcтАО modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files inflate.C. This issue affects proton: before 1.6.16.

item.title: CVE-2026-4745 ┬╖ 10 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Arbitrary Code Execution via Crafted Bytecode in dendibakh/perf-ninja
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in dendibakh perf-ninja (labs/misc/pgo/lua modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files ldo.C. This issue affects perf-ninja.

item.title: CVE-2026-4744 ┬╖ 9.3 CRITICAL тАФ Notepad3 Bundled Oniguruma compile_string_node() Heap Buffer Overflow via Crafted Regex Pattern Allows Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in rizonesoft Notepad3 (тАОscintilla/oniguruma/src modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files regcomp.CтАО. This issue affects Notepad3: before 6.25.714.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-4743 ┬╖ 5.2 MEDIUM тАФ Null-Pointer Dereference Vulnerability in taurusxin/ncmdump
item.description: NULL Pointer Dereference vulnerability in taurusxin ncmdump (тАОsrc/utilsтАО modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files cJSON.CppтАО. This issue affects ncmdump: before 1.4.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-4742 ┬╖ 2.9 LOW ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ HTTP Request Smuggling in visualfc/liteide
item.description: Inconsistent Interpretation of HTTP Requests ('HTTP Request/Response Smuggling') vulnerability in visualfc liteide (liteidex/src/3rdparty/qjsonrpc/src/http-parser modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files http_parser.C. This issueтАж

item.title: CVE-2026-4741 ┬╖ 8.6 HIGH ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Path Traversal Vulnerability in TeamJCD/JoyConDroid
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in TeamJCD JoyConDroid (app/src/main/java/com/rdapps/gamepad/util modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files UnzipUtil.JavaтАО. This issue aтАж

item.title: CVE-2026-4739 ┬╖ 9.4 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Integer overflow vulnerabilities in InsightSoftwareConsortium/ITK
item.description: Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability in InsightSoftwareConsortium ITK (тАОModules/ThirdParty/Expat/src/expat modules).This issue affects ITK: before 2.7.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-4738 ┬╖ 9.4 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ GDAL Bundled zlib (inftree9.c) Pointer Offset Optimization Undefined Behavior Allows Heap Corruption or Remote Code Execution
item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in OSGeo gdal (frmts/zlib/contrib/infback9 modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files inftree9.CтАО. This issue affects gdal: before 3.11.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-4737 ┬╖ 7.3 HIGH тАФ Use-After-Free Vulnerability in No-Chicken/Echo-Mate
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in No-Chicken Echo-Mate (тАОSDK/rv1106-sdk/sysdrv/source/kernel/mm modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files rmap.CтАО. This issue affects Echo-Mate: before V250329.

item.title: CVE-2026-4736 ┬╖ 7.3 HIGH тАФ Math Issue in No-Chicken/Echo-Mate
item.description: Improper Handling of Values vulnerability in No-Chicken Echo-Mate (SDK/rv1106-sdk/sysdrv/source/kernel/include/net/netfilter modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files nf_tables.HтАО, nft_byteorder.CтАО, nft_meta.CтАО. This issue affectsтАж

item.title: CVE-2026-4735 ┬╖ 8.7 HIGH ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ A stack overflow and DoS vulnerability in DTStack/chunjun
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in DTStack chunjun (тАОchunjun-core/src/main/java/com/dtstack/chunjun/util modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files GsonUtil.Java. This issue affects chunjun: before 1.16.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-4734 ┬╖ 9.4 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Heap Buffer Overflow in yoyofr/modizer
item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in yoyofr modizer (libs/libopenmpt/openmpt-trunk/include/premake/contrib/curl/lib modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files imap.CтАО. This issueтАж

item.title: CVE-2026-4733 ┬╖ 5.3 MEDIUM ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Information disclosure in ixray-1.6-stcop
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in ixray-team ixray-1.6-stcop.This issue affects ixray-1.6-stcop: before 1.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-4732 ┬╖ 8.4 HIGH тАФ Out-of-bounds Read Overflow in tildearrow/furnace
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in tildearrow furnace (тАОextern/libsndfile-modified/src modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files flac.CтАО. This issue affects furnace: before 0.7.

item.title: CVE-2026-4731 ┬╖ 8.5 HIGH тАФ An Integer Overflow Vulnerability in artraweditor/ART
item.description: Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability in artraweditor ART (тАОrtengineтАО modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files dcraw.C. This issue affects ART: before 1.25.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-24875 ┬╖ 7.8 HIGH тАФ Integer overflow in modizer
item.description: Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability in yoyofr modizer.This issue affects modizer: before 4.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-24874 ┬╖ 9.1 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Type confusion in xray-monolith
item.description: Access of Resource Using Incompatible Type ('Type Confusion') vulnerability in themrdemonized xray-monolith.This issue affects xray-monolith: before 2025.12.30.

item.title: CVE-2026-24873 ┬╖ 7.8 HIGH тАФ Out-of-bounds read in lpp-vita
item.description: Out-of-bounds Read vulnerability in Rinnegatamante lpp-vita.This issue affects lpp-vita: before lpp-vita r6.

item.title: CVE-2026-24872 ┬╖ 9.8 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Pointer arithmetic error in SkyFire_548
item.description: improper pointer arithmetic vulnerability in ProjectSkyfire SkyFire_548.This issue affects SkyFire_548: before 5.4.8-stable5.

item.title: CVE-2026-24871 ┬╖ 10 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Code injection in Minecraft-Rcon-Manage
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in pilgrimage233 Minecraft-Rcon-Manage.This issue affects Minecraft-Rcon-Manage: before 3.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-24870 ┬╖ 3.7 LOW ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Information disclosure in ixray-1.6-stcop
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in ixray-team ixray-1.6-stcop.This issue affects ixray-1.6-stcop: before 1.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-24832 ┬╖ 9.8 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Out-of-bounds write in ixray-1.6-stcop
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in ixray-team ixray-1.6-stcop.This issue affects ixray-1.6-stcop: before 1.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-24831 ┬╖ 7.5 HIGH ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Infinite loop (DoS) in ixray-1.6-stcop
item.description: Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop') vulnerability in ixray-team ixray-1.6-stcop.This issue affects ixray-1.6-stcop: before 1.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-24830 ┬╖ 9.8 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Integer Overflow or Wraparound in IronOS
item.description: Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability in Ralim IronOS.This issue affects IronOS: before v2.23-rc2.

item.title: CVE-2026-24829 ┬╖ 6.5 MEDIUM ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Out-of-bounds write in is-Engine
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write, Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Is-Daouda is-Engine.This issue affects is-Engine: before 3.3.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-24828 ┬╖ 7.5 HIGH ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Memory leak in is-Engine
item.description: Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime vulnerability in Is-Daouda is-Engine.This issue affects is-Engine: before 3.3.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-24827 ┬╖ 7.5 HIGH ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Out-of-bounds write in Commander-Genius
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in gerstrong Commander-Genius.This issue affects Commander-Genius: before Release refs/pull/358/merge.

item.title: CVE-2026-24826 ┬╖ 10 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ Out-of-bounds write in turso3d
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write, Divide By Zero, NULL Pointer Dereference, Use of Uninitialized Resource, Out-of-bounds Read, Reachable Assertion vulnerability in cadaver turso3d.This issue affects .

item.title: CVE-2026-24825 ┬╖ 6.9 MEDIUM ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ a memory leak in ydb-platform/ydb with use of yajl_tree_parse function from src/yail module, which will cause out-of-memory in server and cause crash.
item.description: Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime vulnerability in ydb-platform ydb (contrib/libs/yajl modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files yail_tree.C. This issue affects ydb: through 24.4.4.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-24824 ┬╖ 6.9 MEDIUM ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ A XSS in yacy/yacy_search_server
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in yacy yacy_search_server (source/net/yacy/http/servlets modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files YaCyDefaultServlet.Java.тАж

item.title: CVE-2026-24823 ┬╖ 10 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ A heap-based buffer over-read or buffer overflow vulnerability in FASTSHIFT/X-TRACK
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write, Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow') vulnerability in FASTSHIFT X-TRACK (Software/X-Track/USER/App/Utils/lv_img_png/PNGdec/src modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files inflatтАж

item.title: CVE-2026-24822 ┬╖ 10 CRITICAL ЁЯМйя╕П тАФ a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in ttttupup/wxhelper via src/mongoose.
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write, Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in ttttupup wxhelper (src modules). This vulnerability is associated with program files mongoose.C. This issue affects wxhelper: through 3.9.10.19-v1.
